title: lichen_l2_input: missing NULL parameter validation
description:
firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c line 343:

void lichen_l2_input(struct net_if *iface, const uint8_t *data, size_t len, ...)

This public API does not validate that iface or data are non-NULL before use. If called with NULL data:
- Line 384 (lichen_link_rx) or line 403 (memcpy) will dereference NULL
- Undefined behavior / crash

If called with NULL iface:
- Line 408 (net_pkt_rx_alloc_with_buffer) passes NULL iface
- Line 437 (net_recv_data) passes NULL iface

Current internal caller (lora_rx_callback at line 291) guards lichen_iface but external callers are unprotected. Add early NULL checks and return -EINVAL (or void with LOG_ERR).
